name: GitHub Stats
description: Look up public stats for any GitHub repository or user — stars, forks, last commit, top languages. Uses unauthenticated REST (60 req/hr).
author: Ghast AI

tools.name: Get GitHub repo stats
tools.description: Return stars, forks, issues, language, last push for a public repo.

tools.name: Get GitHub user profile
tools.description: Return public profile + follower / repo counts for a GitHub user.
